title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.387 - Baker service appreciation day designated for April 16
text:
9.387.  Baker service appreciation day designated for April 16. — April sixteenth of each year is hereby designated as "Baker Service Appreciation Day".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities to honor the memories of David and Brian Baker and their lives of service to others.
(L. 2023 S.B. 139)
